images.alt: A regal cyber-orc warrior lying supine across the cracked marble floor of a ruined throne plaza, posed with the right knee raised, the left ankle resting across the right knee, and both hands calmly placed on the raised knee. The figure wears an imperial court gown fused with chrome-and-obsidian plate armor, combining battle-worn cybernetic power with Baroque high-fantasy elegance. The setting merges a grand marble throne room with a neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza at dusk. Towering pillars, clan banners, red carpet fragments, holographic signage, ruined skyscrapers, and attending courtiers frame the scene. Radioactive green light and pulsing holograms reflect across the armor. Faint ozone haze, long shadows, cracked stone, and cinematic city glow fill the atmosphere. Composition: full-body vertical portrait, high-angle cinematic framing, subject centered with symmetrical architectural structure, reclining pose emphasized as calm, powerful, and commanding. Lighting: dramatic chiaroscuro with warm golden side light from tall windows mixed with neon green and magenta city glow, highlighting gold armor details, chrome surfaces, and velvet textures. Mood: regal, opulent, commanding, formidable, mythic, cinematic.

record.bridgyOriginalText:
. The recipe prompt needs ingredients and cooking time. The project timeline needs deadlines and dependencies. Different jobs need different prompts.

Go Forward: Build prompts around what you actually need, not around some formula you found online. Give the AI the context it can't get on its own, and stop expecting it to know things outside its training. That's how you get results that actually work. (7/8)

record.bridgyOriginalText: Your 5-Minute Reality Check: Tonight, sit down at home and try this. Pick two completely different tasks. Maybe you want a recipe for dinner and you also want help drafting a project timeline for work. Write a prompt for each one. Don't use any template. Just describe what you need in plain language, include the specific details that matter for that task, and tell the AI what format you want the answer in. Notice how the two prompts look nothing alike. That's the point (6/8)

images.alt:
このイラストには、メイド衣装を身にまとった中性的な容姿の少年が、部屋の窓際に佇む姿が描かれています。

少年の髪はダークグリーンのショートヘアで、前髪が右目を覆うように無造作に下りており、見えている左目は少し冷ややかでアンニュイな表情を浮かべています。頭には白いフリルのついたカチューシャ（ヘッドドレス）と、大きな黒い猫耳をつけており、腰の後ろからはリボンのついた黒い猫の尻尾が伸びています。

衣装は、深いグリーンの長袖ワンピースに、白いフリルがふんだんにあしらわれたエプロンドレスを重ねたクラシカルなメイド服です。しかし、胸元や肩周りにはミリタリー調のカーキ色のタクティカルハーネス（ベルトやバックル）が装着されており、独特な重厚感を与えています。

両手には白い手袋をはめ、スカートの裾を軽くつまむような仕草をしています。スカートの下には黒いショートパンツ、そして白いニーハイソックスを履いており、太ももにはミリタリー風のホルスターが巻かれています。

背景には格子状の大きな木枠の窓があり、そこから温かい自然光が差し込んで、少年の姿を逆光気味に照らし出しています。全体的に繊細なタッチで、可愛らしさとミリタリー要素が融合した独特の世界観を持つイラストです。

images.alt:
A dark, cinematic night scene unfolds beneath an enormous full moon glowing warm gold against a deep blue-black sky. In the foreground, a solitary figure sits quietly on a simple chair, their form reduced to a shadowy silhouette. The person faces away from the viewer, appearing small and contemplative beneath a strangely curved tree that rises from the ground like a bent spine. The tree’s trunk twists upward before branching into a tangled canopy of thin, leafless limbs. Several black birds perch among the branches while others seem frozen mid-flight, their silhouettes scattered across the moonlit backdrop. The moon dominates the composition, positioned directly behind the tree and illuminating every delicate twig in stark contrast. Fine debris, drifting leaves, and tiny glowing particles float through the air, adding movement to the otherwise still scene. The wet ground reflects faint highlights from the moon, creating subtle pools of amber light amid the darkness. Additional birds gather along the distant ground, barely visible through the misty atmosphere. The overall image evokes isolation, reflection, and quiet mystery, balancing haunting beauty with a sense of peaceful stillness beneath the night sky.
Keywords:
moon, silhouette, tree, birds, night, solitude, reflection, mist, branches, darkness, atmospheric, landscape
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A highly symmetrical abstract composition fills the frame with layered geometric forms arranged around a central vanishing point. Thousands of translucent triangles, diamonds, and angular shards overlap to create the appearance of a crystalline tunnel receding into infinite distance. The color palette follows a full-spectrum rainbow progression, with fiery reds, oranges, and yellows dominating the left side and lower center, while cool blues, teals, and violets occupy the right side and upper regions. The shapes appear stacked in successive layers, producing a strong sense of depth and motion despite the static image. Near the center, the geometry narrows into a luminous corridor that draws the eye inward toward a tiny dark focal area. Semi-transparent facets intersect throughout the composition, creating glowing edges and subtle color blending where forms overlap. A faint grid of square panels frames the scene, adding structure beneath the more chaotic crystalline explosion. The overall effect resembles a kaleidoscope, stained glass cathedral, and digital prism combined into a vibrant dimensional portal.
Keywords:
abstract, geometric, rainbow, prism, kaleidoscope, crystalline, symmetry, spectrum, tunnel, colorful, polygonal, vortex

images.alt:
An abstract digital artwork depicts a lone human eye suspended within an explosive field of fractured shapes and painterly fragments. The eye occupies the upper right portion of the composition, rendered with striking realism against a surrounding landscape of chaotic motion. Hundreds of angular strokes, broken architectural forms, and dark geometric shards radiate outward from a central vanishing point near the middle of the image. The effect resembles a city being pulled apart, stretched through space, or collapsing into a singularity of light and motion. Deep blacks, charcoal grays, muted blues, and weathered earth tones dominate the palette, contrasted by pale ivory highlights that illuminate the scene. The lower portion suggests a fragmented roadway or corridor leading toward a distant glow, while the upper region erupts into streaks that resemble shattered buildings, brushstrokes, or fragments of memory. The eye appears calm yet watchful amid the surrounding turbulence, creating a tension between observation and destruction. Strong directional movement draws the viewer inward, while the painterly texture and layered abstraction blur the boundary between architecture, landscape, and consciousness.
Keywords:
eye, abstraction, fragmentation, geometry, cityscape, perception, motion, surreal, texture, vanishing-point, painterly, contrast
AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.
